$exampleSchema._comment: Example only — documents the shape. The renderer reads `entries`, not this key. Drop entries with newest first. `kind` is one of "feat" | "fix". Date format YYYY-MM-DD.
$exampleSchema.headline: Short tagline shown as the section title

entries.headline: See what you're eligible to take, on Paper.nu

items.text: Paper.nu search now shows little eligibility badges on every course based on what you've already taken in CAESAR — click the chip above the results to hide the ones you can't take yet.
Schedule cards on Paper.nu pick up a small ✓ or ? marker — hover to see what the course is asking for.
Your CAESAR course history is now cached and viewable in the popup under "My courses".

entries.headline: Missing grad year? You're in; schedule combinations

items.text: Cycle every non-overlapping schedule of your Paper.nu classes — pin sections, set a credit range, sort by CTEC rating.
If we couldn't read your expected graduation year from CAESAR, the extension now unlocks anyway instead of holding you back.
Loading CTECs on Sharper Search now signs you in properly instead of getting stuck.
Accessing CTECs on CAESAR normally works now.
Smoother, more consistent CTEC analytics colors.
